---
title: "Teaching"
description: "" 
listing:
  - id: harvard-business-school
    include:
      type: "Harvard"
    contents: teaching.yaml
    template: teaching.ejs
    # filter-ui: false
    sort: "year desc"
    sort-ui: false
    categories: true
  - id: uc-berkeley
    include:
      type: "Berkeley"
    contents: teaching.yaml
    template: teaching.ejs
    # filter-ui: true
    sort: "year desc"
    sort-ui: false
    categories: true
  - id: community-teaching
    include:
      type: "Community"
    contents: teaching.yaml
    template: teaching.ejs
    sort: "year desc"
    sort-ui: false
    categories: true
language:
  listing-page-field-categories: "Course Topics"
toc: false    
page-layout: full
footnotes-hover: false
format:
  html:
    anchor-sections: false
---

## University of California, Berkeley

::: {#uc-berkeley}
:::

## Harvard Business School

::: {#harvard-business-school}
:::

::: {#community-teaching}
:::
